title: Silky Peruvian Quinoa Muffins
description: These herbal quinoa muffins are a savory yet comforting dish perfect for vegetarians and those looking for a hangover cure.
instructions: Rinse quinoa in a fine mesh strainer and transfer to a medium saucepan.
Add water or vegetable broth, turmeric powder, and coriander seeds. Bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until water is absorbed (approximately 15 minutes).
Stir in ground cumin, basil leaves, chives, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
Pour into prepared muffin tin lined with paper liners or sprayed with cooking spray.
Bake at 375°F for about 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
